hero.title:
Realize the Potential of Youth
Achievement
hero.description: Building an active, creative, and character-driven young generation through innovative and impactful programs for community advancement.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Building Youth Character
about.description1: Sukamaju Hub is a youth organization committed to developing the potential and talents of young people in the Cilodong Village area.
about.description2: Through various social, educational, and self-development programs, we strive to create responsible youths who play an active role in community development.

programs.label: Our Programs
programs.title: Featured Activities
programs.subtitle: Various programs designed to develop youth potential and benefit the community.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become a hub for Sukamaju youth that is active, creative, innovative, and impactful in building a harmonious, independent, and sustainable community.

items.1: Develop youth potential through social, educational, sports, arts, and entrepreneurship activities.
items.2: Foster the spirit of mutual cooperation and care for the environment and community.
items.3: Build collaboration with government, community, and various strategic partners.
items.4: Leverage digital technology as a means of service, communication, and organizational development.
items.5: Create a professional, transparent, inclusive organization that provides real benefits to the community.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What They Say?
testimonials.subtitle: Stories and experiences from members and partners of Sukamaju Hub.

cta.title: Ready to Join Us?
cta.description: Be part of Sukamaju Hub and realize your best potential with us.

footer.description: Sukamaju Hub is a youth organization committed to developing the potential and talents of young people.
footer.address: Cilodong Village, Sukamaju District, Depok City

tentang.pageSubtitle: Learn more about the history, vision, mission, and organizational structure of Sukamaju Hub.

sejarah.title: Brief History
sejarah.p1: Sukamaju Hub is a youth organization founded in 2026 as a platform for young people in the Cilodong Village area to unite, develop, and make real contributions to the community.
sejarah.p2: This organization was born from the spirit of mutual cooperation, togetherness, and social care with the aim of creating a collaborative space capable of developing youth potential in various fields.
sejarah.p3: Sukamaju Hub is committed to being a driving force for positive youth activities for the community through various empowerment and social service programs.

tentang.visiText: To become a hub for Sukamaju youth that is active, creative, innovative, and impactful in building a harmonious, independent, and sustainable community through the spirit of collaboration and mutual cooperation.
misi: Develop youth potential through social, educational, sports, arts, and entrepreneurship activities.
Foster the spirit of mutual cooperation and care for the environment and community.
Build collaboration with government, community, and various strategic partners.
Leverage digital technology as a means of service, communication, and organizational development.
Create a professional, transparent, inclusive organization that provides real benefits to the community.
tentang.skDesc: Download the official establishment decree of Sukamaju Hub as proof of organizational legality.

daftar.type1Desc: Become an official youth organization member at village level. Choose your field of interest and contribute to organizational work programs.
